Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,165 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: dynamic(), Factory, FactoryDefaultProps
+- Reads as: imports Context, HandlerClass, ContextConfig, Env, Any, Schema
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/, src/helper/cookie/, src/helper/testing/, src/helper/adapter/
+- Safe summary: Creates dynamic helper class that adapts handlers with runtime configuration
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes(), routePath(), baseRoutePath(), basePath()
+- Reads as: imports Context, GET_MATCH_RESULT, RouterRoute, getPattern, splitRoutingPath
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/, src/helper/cookie/, src/helper/testing/, src/helper/adapter/
+- Safe summary: Route inspection utilities for retrieving matched route information
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSReadyState, WSContext, createWSMessageEvent, defineWebSocketHelper
+- Reads as: imports Context, MiddlewareHandler, TypedResponse
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/, src/helper/route/, src/helper/testing/
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for creating upgrade handler with event listeners
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: imports Context, imports from utils/cookie, imports type Cookie utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/, src/helper/route/, src/helper/testing/
+- Safe summary: Cookie manipulation helpers for session management
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: imports hc, Client, ClientRequestOptions, ExecutionContext, UnionToIntersection
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/client/, src/helper/adapter/
+- Safe summary: Helper to create test client instance from Hono app
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Runtime (type), env, knownUserAgents, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: imports Context, uses globalThis for environment detection
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/, src/helper/cookie/, src/helper/route/
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection and environment accessor for edge platforms
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, raw, cssClass, rawCssString, viewTransition
+- Reads as: imports from helper/html, imports from helper/css/common, imports DOM constants
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/, src/helper/css/common/, src/helper/jsx/dom/css/
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JSX helper with class utility and responsive styles
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, SELECTOR (symbol), CLASS_NAME (symbol), STYLE_STRING (symbol), cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Reads as: exports symbols, exports CSS string helpers, exports class utility
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index/, src/helper/hono-jsx/
+- Safe summary: Shared CSS utilities, symbols, and common helper functions
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, ProxyHandler, ProxyHandlerFactory
+- Reads as: imports HTTPException, uses Node http module for proxying
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/, src/helper/adapter/, src/helper/route/
+- Safe summary: HTTP request proxy middleware for forwarding requests to backend
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: imports Hono, getColorEnabled, findTargetHandler, isMiddleware
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/, src/helper/cookie/, src/helper/adapter/
+- Safe summary: Development utilities for inspecting and displaying routes
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: imports escapeToBuffer, resolveCallbackSync, stringBufferToString from utils/html
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/, src/helper/cookie/, src/helper/testing/
+- Safe summary: Template literal HTML escaping helper with built-in raw option
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: staticGeneration, staticRender, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, ssg, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: exports star from ./ssg, re-exports from ./middleware, exports from ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins/, src/helper/streaming/
+- Safe summary: Static site generation (SSG) helper with multiple plugin support
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: saveContentToFile, writeContentToFile, saveContentFromCache, removeContentFromCache, writeContentFromCache, getStaticGenerationInfo, saveCacheFile
+- Reads as: implements save hooks, implements before hooks, handles file operations
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/streaming/
+- Safe summary: Core SSG logic with file saving and caching functionality
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: imports Hono, METHOD_NAME_ALL, imports findTargetHandler, isMiddleware

+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG

+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: exports stream from ./stream, exports streamSSE from ./sse, exports streamText from ./text
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Main streaming helper module combining all streaming types
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi, isOldBunVersion
+- Reads as: imports Context, imports StreamingApi, uses isOldBunVersion
+- Neighbor
